testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Expected status code 200 but got 422 Response body: {"status":"FAILURE","requestId":"8e37b733-f4e3-4ad5-b980-43833c5d67bd","datetime":"05-04-2026 22:14:55","error":{"errorInfo":"err.empty"}} expected [200] but found [422]
